title: Add shared Zephyr BLE app owner skeleton
description: Implement a gateway-internal BLE app owner that is the single caller of bt_enable(), bt_le_adv_start(), bt_le_adv_stop(), and advertising restart. Initial behavior must preserve today's mutually exclusive product modes and CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1 assumptions while moving no payload semantics.
acceptance_criteria: native_sim or build tests cover one-owner init/advertising composition for current native, Meshtastic, and MeshCore product modes; unsupported combinations fail deterministically; no physical hardware required.
notes: Implemented shared Zephyr BLE app owner skeleton. Owner centralizes bt_enable(), bt_le_adv_start(), bt_le_adv_stop(), and restart; native, Meshtastic, and MeshCore surfaces now delegate advertising to owner while retaining existing payload/session semantics. Added deterministic surface validation so compiled product modes accept only the matching owner surface; standalone ztests exercise native/Meshtastic/MeshCore mode paths via compile definitions. Added native_sim owner tests for start/restart/stop, backend failure paths, invalid advertising, product-mode rejection, native ble_uart_init(), Meshtastic ble_meshtastic_init(), and MeshCore ble_meshcore_init(); tests assert advertising flags, UUID payload bytes, shortened-name scan responses, and option bits. Reviews: Pasteur and Hilbert found P2 gaps in product-mode and composition coverage; fixed. Aquinas and Kierkegaard final reviews reported no P0/P1/P2 findings. Local check: git diff --cached --check passed. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 in /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate with patch t2hn221f: west twister -T lichen/tests/ble_app_owner -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshcore_ble -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn221f-native --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen passed 6/6 scenarios, 58 test cases executed, 3 skipped, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings in 241.43s. Gateway build: west build -b native_sim lichen/apps/gateway -d build/gateway-native-t2hn221f -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen passed; size build/gateway-native-t2hn221f/zephyr/zephyr.elf text=150479 data=6001 bss=47933 dec=204413 hex=31e7d. Notable warnings: Zephyr build reported existing empty-library warnings for loramac-node, drivers__net, and drivers__spi.
